key_insight: A learnable control module can improve multimodal masked diffusion models by choosing better generation orders than logits alone, especially for spatially detailed text-to-image and multimodal tasks.
engineering_relevance: This suggests a practical way to boost diffusion-based generation and reasoning systems by adding a lightweight policy layer for token ordering rather than changing the base model.
method: Train a control block to predict generation order for multimodal diffusion models.
Optimize the control block with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO).
Use the learned order to improve text-to-image synthesis and multimodal understanding.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports 4.08% relative improvement on GenEval for text-to-image alignment and 4.85% relative improvement on VLMEvalKit for multimodal understanding.
watch_item: The added control module introduces extra training complexity and its gains may depend on the quality of GRPO optimization and the target modality.
paper_title: Reinforcing the Generation Order of Multimodal Masked Diffusion Models
